description: Create a shared CommandPaletteUI React component (the visual overlay, distinct from the existing command-palette logic package) with dark mode support, and a ThemeProvider that handles animated theme transitions. Also create an EmptyStateIllustration component with per-app branded illustrations, and an OptimisticAction hook for optimistic UI with rollback. These are the remaining shared primitives needed for Phase 68's experience polish.
steps: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/CommandPaletteUI/index.tsx - A visually polished command palette overlay component using framer-motion for enter/exit animations (scale+fade with spring.stiff). Integrates with the existing CommandMenu pattern but adds: grouped results with icons, keyboard navigation highlighting, fuzzy match highlighting, footer showing keyboard shortcuts. Uses brand system colors.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/CommandPaletteUI/CommandPaletteUI.test.tsx - tests for open/close, keyboard navigation, search filtering

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/ThemeProvider/index.tsx - React context provider that: manages light/dark/system theme state, persists to localStorage, provides useThemeMode hook, wraps theme transitions in a CSS class-based animated transition (not a flash). Sets data-theme attribute on documentElement.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/ThemeProvider/ThemeProvider.test.tsx - tests for theme switching, localStorage persistence

Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/EmptyStateIllustration/index.tsx - Enhanced empty state with SVG illustrations that use the current app's brand color (from CSS var --app-color). Variants: no-data, no-results, no-connection, first-time. Each has warm, human copy.

Create packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useOptimisticAction.ts - hook that: takes an async action, immediately applies optimistic state, rolls back with a shake animation CSS class on failure, shows success feedback on completion. Returns {execute, isPending, isSuccess, isError}.
Create packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useOptimisticAction.test.ts - tests for optimistic state, rollback on error, success state
Export all new components and hooks from packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts: CommandPaletteUI, ThemeProvider, useThemeMode, EmptyStateIllustration, useOptimisticAction
Run pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/shared-ui and pnpm test --filter=@quant/shared-ui to verify
acceptance_criteria: CommandPaletteUI renders as a modal overlay with framer-motion animations
ThemeProvider manages light/dark mode with animated transitions (no flash)
EmptyStateIllustration has at least 4 variants using app brand color
useOptimisticAction hook handles success and rollback scenarios
findings: jsdom does not provide window.matchMedia so ThemeProvider checks for its availability before calling it. Fuzzy search highlighting splits text into individual spans, so text matching in tests uses role-based queries (getAllByRole option) rather than getByText for filtered results. Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook. All 201 tests pass including 11 CommandPaletteUI, 9 ThemeProvider, and 7 useOptimisticAction tests.
